name: No Bake Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, sugar, and cocoa powder in a saucepan. Heat over medium heat until the mixture boils.
2. Boil for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter, margarine, oats, chopped nuts, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Allow the cookies to cool completely before serving.
